name: Quiche Kenepuru
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a flan ring or pie dish with the pastry.
2. Beat the eggs until blended.
3. Mix corn flour with a little cream to form a paste.
4. Add remaining cream, salt, pepper, marjoram, and mayonnaise; mix to blend.
5. Sprinkle onion and cheese on top of the pastry.
6. Add chopped mussels (pieces should be bite-sized).
7. Pour egg mixture over the mussels.
8. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes.
9. Reduce oven temperature to 325°F and continue cooking until filling is set when tested with a knife blade. This takes about 10 extra minutes.
10. Serve 6 servings.
